template_data.sub: You don't sub to fill a skills gap. You sub to build the record that opens the next door.

Right column: three stacked short labels with green checks — 'CPARS RATING', 'DOLLAR VALUE', 'TRACK RECORD'. Clean dark navy background throughout. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
